primary_objective: Reusable next-day SPX OHLC hybrid forecast engine
important_findings: Pure ML OHLC forecasting underperformed naive and rolling baselines overall.
Hybrid forecast architecture improved absolute OHLC accuracy.
Gap and open remain weakest modeled components; rolling baseline currently best.
ES daily features improved directional context more than point accuracy.
Yahoo recent intraday ES data is insufficient for robust historical overnight modeling.
pending_next_steps: Accumulate 5 to 20 live reconciled forecast rows.
Clean overnight feature handling in main feature builder.
resume_instruction: Read docs/PROJECT_HANDOFF.md and docs/project_state.json first before continuing development.
